Author: Avaflow, Ars Magna, Kelvin, Terralyn
Name: HrothRemover
Punchline: Turn all Hrothgars into Miqo'te (or other races!)
Description:
Turn all Hrothgars into Miqo'te (or other races!)
/hr on = enable plugin.
/hr off = disable plugin.

Author: Aireil, Yukina
Name: FF Logs Viewer Plus
Punchline: View FF Logs ranking percentiles in-game.
Description: View FF Logs ranking percentiles in-game. Add a context menu to open someone's logs. Layout, style, stats, default metric, and more are all customizable in the settings.
Changelog:
-2.4.2.3
    Improve FF Logs related errors logging and handling.
-2.4.2.2
    Fix a potential crash.
-2.4.2.1
    Update default layout with M12S P2.
.-2.4.2.0
    Update default layout with Savage by WorstAquaPlayer, thank you!.
-2.4.1.0
    Unreal update and open with reliability improvements by WorstAquaPlayer, thank you!²
-2.4.0.0
    7.4 update by WorstAquaPlayer, thank you!

Author: Uki
Name: GlamourousGallery
Description: Browse Glamourer designs as a thumbnail gallery, apply them quickly, and organize them with favorites, hidden entries, tags, and custom cropped thumbnails. Use /glamgallery to open the gallery.
Changelog:
-v1.1.0..3
   Now saves last used sort and filter options per-character.
-v1.1.0.2
   Untagged entries now show last in tag sort mode.
-1.1.0.1
    Added hex field to color picker. Folder footer option now shows full path. Added sorting by tags. Added setting to remove favorite prefix.

-1.1.0.0
    Added Tag Colors. Added folder support. Added favorites button. Added settings for sorting favorites. Fixed overwriting thumbnails.

Author: ReMakePlace Maintainers
Name: ReMakePlace Plugin Unlocked
Punchline: Automatically save & load furniture layouts in any house.
Description: Automatically save & load interior and exterior house layouts. Import/export layouts from the ReMakePlace program.

Author: Infi, ash, Anna, Lunatory
Name: Better Party Finder Plus
Punchline: Use advanced Party Finder filter presets.
Description:
Filter the party finder better.

All vanilla filtering is available, plus:

- Create filter presets to easily switch between
- Whitelist/blacklist specific duties and categories
- Add character names to hide PFs from
- Remove PFs above maximum item level
- Filter on item level range
- Filter on multiple jobs and slots (ex. MCH + GNB available)
- Now with more filters!
